content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Product Oriented Recurrence". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1182/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case: The first line contains two integers N and M. The second line contains N integers representing the array A.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the result of the product oriented recurrence relation.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: To solve this problem, we can use dynamic programming to calculate the product oriented recurrence relation. We will create a 2D array dp where dp[i][j] represents the result of the recurrence relation for the first i elements and the first j operations.
